title: Clinical Scribe Agent
description: Empowers healthcare providers to deliver undivided patient care by automating in-session clinical documentation and charting workflows.

features.name: Real-Time Speech-to-Text Transcription
features.description: Converts live spoken conversations between doctors and patients into text in real time, displaying the transcript as the consultation unfolds.

features.name: Multi-Format Clinical Summarization
features.description: Automatically structures the completed transcript into six distinct clinical summary formats, giving clinicians the right level of detail for every workflow.

features.name: PHI Masking & Data Privacy
features.description: Automatically detects and redacts sensitive patient identifiers from raw transcripts, keeping patient data secure and fully compliant with privacy requirements.

features.name: Easy Audio Capture
features.description: Captures microphone audio directly within your standard browser session, requiring no special hardware or standalone recording software.

features.name: Session Dashboard & History
features.description: A secure dashboard where users can review past transcription sessions, view generated summaries, and track clinical documentation history.

sales_tagline: Automate Clinical Documentation and Simplify Clinician Workflows.
time_savings: Cuts typical charting times significantly per patient visit.
Saves clinicians valuable hours every week, returning time for additional patient care.

title: Health Plan Navigator Chatbot
description: Provides health plan members and insurance agents with immediate, natural language access to complex coverage benefits and provider directories.

features.name: Instant Benefit Answers
features.description: Answers questions about health insurance coverage (such as dental, vision, hearing, and fitness benefits) instantly, helping users understand their plan without reading through long policy documents.

features.name: Doctor & Pharmacy Locator
features.description: Helps users find doctors and pharmacies close to their home by city, county, or zip code, showing helpful details like addresses, phone numbers, and special services.

features.name: Bilingual Support (English & Spanish)
features.description: Chats naturally in both English and Spanish, automatically detecting the user's language and remembering the conversation history for a smooth experience.

features.name: Quick Connection to Human Support
features.description: Automatically connects users with customer service or registers their enrollment interest when they request extra assistance during the chat.

sales_tagline: Resolve Member Benefits Queries Automatically and Instantly, 24/7.
time_savings: Reduces customer support average handling time (AHT) to zero for self-served members.
Connects members with correct local doctors and pharmacies instantly.

title: Recruitment Assessment System
description: Accelerates enterprise hiring cycles by standardizing candidate evaluations and automating routine applicant screening tasks.

features.name: Smart Job Requirement Analyzer
features.description: Automatically reviews uploaded job descriptions to identify key requirements, such as required technical skills, minimum years of experience, and educational qualifications, setting a clear benchmark for screening.

features.name: AI Resume Screening & Ranking
features.description: Scans and matches applicant resumes against job requirements in seconds, scoring and ranking candidates based on how well their experience, education, and skills align with the open position.

features.name: Integrated Video Interview Rooms
features.description: Creates secure, high-definition video meeting rooms directly inside the web browser. Candidates and recruiters can connect face-to-face for interviews without installing any external apps or downloads.

features.name: Secure, Self-Expiring Interview Links
features.description: Generates private, secure interview invitation links for shortlisted candidates. These links automatically expire after a set time to maintain testing schedules and security.

features.name: Automated Candidate Evaluation
features.description: Generates custom screening questions based on the candidate's profile, and uses AI to evaluate candidate answers to those questions during the screening process, producing an instant scorecard.

features.name: Hiring Team Collaboration Hub
features.description: Offers a central dashboard where managers can assign jobs to recruiters, check the status of applicants, track team metrics (resumes reviewed, interviews scheduled, offers sent), and download candidate reports.

features.name: Applicant Tracking System (ATS) Integration
features.description: Connects seamlessly with existing HR software and Applicant Tracking Systems, allowing candidate data, status updates, and scores to sync automatically between platforms.

sales_tagline: Cut Candidate Screening Time and Hire Top Talent Faster.
time_savings: Reduces manual resume screening and shortlist processing time significantly.
Shortens the overall recruiting cycle from weeks to days, helping you secure top candidates before competitors do.

title: Remote Therapeutic Monitoring (RTM) Platform
description: Enables physical therapy clinics to monitor patient recovery outside office visits while establishing recurring remote care revenue streams.

features.name: Remote Therapeutic Monitoring (RTM)
features.description: Enables providers to monitor patient progress outside the clinic by tracking exercise adherence, pain levels, and recovery feedback in real time.

features.name: Patient Exercise & Engagement Tools
features.description: Delivers guided therapeutic exercises with 3D visual aids, reminders, and motivational engagement to improve adherence and consistency.

features.name: Provider Clinical Dashboard
features.description: Helps providers assign exercises, monitor patient compliance, adjust treatment plans, and review patient-reported outcomes in one centralized system.

features.name: Automated Documentation & Reporting
features.description: Reduces administrative burden by organizing patient data, tracking compliance, and generating RTM-qualifying reports for reimbursement.

features.name: Revenue & RTM Billing Support
features.description: Supports CPT-based RTM billing workflows (98975, 98977, 98980, 98981) and helps providers estimate additional revenue from monitored patients.

sales_tagline: Unlock New Revenue Streams and Improve Patient Exercise Adherence.
time_savings: Reduces clinician administrative overhead by automating patient compliance tracking and billing audits.
Enables monitoring of significantly more patients simultaneously compared to manual check-ins.

title: Telemedicine Platform
description: Connects clinical facilities and remote patients with licensed specialists via secure, low-latency virtual consultations.

features.name: Secure Telemedicine Consultations
features.description: Provides patients with access to medical specialists through secure video-based consultations from any location.

features.name: Specialist Access Network
features.description: Connects patients with a wide range of medical specialists to improve care access and reduce geographic barriers.

features.name: Continuity of Care Support
features.description: Helps providers maintain ongoing patient care by enabling follow-ups, treatment updates, and remote monitoring.

features.name: Flexible Provider Platform
features.description: Allows healthcare professionals to offer telemedicine services with flexible scheduling and remote work opportunities.

features.name: Insurance & Accessibility Support
features.description: Supports acceptance of multiple insurance types, including Medicaid, to make healthcare more accessible to patients.

sales_tagline: Bridges Specialty Medical Gaps and Reduces Hospital Readmissions.
time_savings: Saves patients hours of travel and waiting room time by enabling instant specialist consults.
Accelerates specialist consult scheduling significantly, reducing long wait times.

title: Practice Management EHR Platform
description: Streamlines physical therapy practice operations by integrating clinical scheduling, electronic health records, and billing workflows into a single interface.

features.name: AI-Powered EHR & Documentation
features.description: Uses artificial intelligence to generate treatment documentation, create reports, and access clinical data quickly using customizable therapy templates.

features.name: Integrated Remote Therapeutic Monitoring (RTM)
features.description: Enables clinics to track patient home exercises and bill for RTM services, helping increase revenue while supporting patient recovery outside the clinic.

features.name: Patient Portal & Engagement Tools
features.description: Allows patients to schedule appointments, message therapists, upload documents, make payments, and track their care through a centralized portal.

features.name: Billing & Revenue Cycle Management (RCM)
features.description: Provides end-to-end billing support, claim management, and revenue optimization services to ensure faster and more accurate reimbursements.

features.name: Automated Patient Communication
features.description: Sends reminders via email and SMS to reduce missed appointments and improve patient adherence to treatment plans.

sales_tagline: Cut Therapist Administrative Documentation Load on an All-in-One EHR.
time_savings: Reduces clinician documentation and scheduling workloads, saving valuable hours.
Cuts average billing claim lifecycle processing and collections duration.

title: Digital Prescription & Virtual Assistant Platform
description: Modernizes medication management by connecting clinicians with nationwide pharmacy networks and real-time electronic prescribing tools.

features.name: Digital Prescription Management
features.description: Enables providers to create, manage, track, renew, cancel, and transmit electronic prescriptions through a centralized prescribing platform.

features.name: Controlled Substances Prescribing
features.description: Supports secure electronic prescribing of controlled medications with compliant verification workflows.

features.name: Prescription Monitoring Integration
features.description: Provides instant access to drug history to support informed prescribing decisions, identify potential misuse, and meet regulatory requirements.

features.name: Automated Prior Authorization
features.description: Automates prior authorization workflows by enabling providers to submit, review, and receive approval responses directly within the prescribing screen.

features.name: Clinical Decision Support
features.description: Performs real-time drug-drug, drug-allergy, drug-food, duplicate therapy, and dosage interaction checks to improve patient safety.

features.name: Medication History & Eligibility Verification
features.description: Retrieves patient medication history, insurance eligibility, formulary information, and prescription benefits to support accurate treatment decisions.

features.name: Real-Time Prescription Benefit & Formulary Intelligence
features.description: Provides real-time prescription benefit and formulary insights to help prescribers select cost-effective and covered medications.

features.name: AI-Powered Virtual Assistance
features.description: Offers intelligent conversational assistance for prescribers, helping users navigate workflows, access support resources, and resolve operational questions quickly.

features.name: AI Medication Adherence Prediction
features.description: Utilizes predictive analytics to identify patients at risk of medication non-adherence, enabling proactive interventions and improved health outcomes.

features.name: Practice Software Integration
features.description: Supports standard integration models with existing practice management and patient record systems for seamless data exchange and workflow continuity.

sales_tagline: Ensure High Prescribing Accuracy and Surescripts-Certified Electronic Workflows.
time_savings: Cuts staff time spent on phone calls with insurance companies and pharmacies.
Reduces prior authorization request timelines from days to instant approvals.

title: Conversational Database Reports
description: Allows non-technical teams to query database sources and generate business intelligence reports using plain English search.

features.name: Automated Business Glossary Mapping
features.description: Scans data structures and automatically generates business-friendly descriptions for files and data fields, creating an easy-to-use search glossary.

features.name: Glossary Customization Console
features.description: Allows administrators to review and update business definitions, ensuring system outputs align with specific company terminology and reporting guidelines.

features.name: Plain English Search
features.description: Enables team members to ask questions about company data in plain language and get answers without needing technical training or database skills.

features.name: Smart Chart Recommendations
features.description: Recommends visual presentations (such as bar charts, line graphs, or pie charts) based on the data requested to help users see trends instantly.

features.name: Multi-Database Reporting Spaces
features.description: Organizes business data sources and reports into dedicated spaces, simplifying data management across different departments or lines of business.

sales_tagline: Query Databases in Plain English and Reduce Analyst Request Backlogs.
time_savings: Reduces data analyst ad-hoc request backlogs through self-service querying.
Generates executable SQL and retrieves structured results instantly compared to manual requests.

title: Intelligent Reporting System
description: Translates complex clinical databases into readable tables and reports and documentation for healthcare administrators through conversational search.

features.name: Plain English Data Search
features.description: Allows users to search data in plain language and returns results as clear, readable tables. Includes automatic correction to refine searches instantly if needed.

features.name: Automated CRM Escalation
features.description: If a user's conversational query cannot be answered by the database, the AI automatically creates a support ticket in the CRM to ensure a team member resolves the inquiry.

features.name: AI Data Terminology Mapping
features.description: Maps complex database structures to clear business descriptions. When a user asks a question, the AI retrieves only the relevant terminology to keep responses accurate.

features.name: Management Dashboard
features.description: Practice administrators can update data terms, monitor search frequency, and track system speed and resource usage through a clean administrative panel.

sales_tagline: Query Operational Data in Plain English.
time_savings: Saves valuable hours by automating custom operational reports.
Eliminates wait times for database extracts, delivering data responses instantly.

title: Voice Agent
description: Interacts directly with patients via automated voice calls to send reminders, follow up on missed visits, and schedule doctor appointments, streamlining clinic workflows.

features.name: Automated Call Interaction
features.description: Interacts directly with patients whose missed days criteria are met, initiating calls to remind them of follow-ups and improve clinic attendance rates.

features.name: Doctor Appointment Scheduler
features.description: Coordinates calendars and books direct patient appointments with healthcare providers like Dr. Johnson based on interactive patient responses.

features.name: Real-Time Patient Dashboard
features.description: Provides administrators a clean interface listing names, phone numbers, DOB, missed days count, and primary providers, with options to trigger calls manually.

features.name: Seamless EHR Integration
features.description: Logs call history, details, and scheduled appointments back into the clinic database to ensure synchronized patient record management.

sales_tagline: Automate Patient Outreach and Doctor Appointment Booking with AI Call Agents.
time_savings: Saves valuable hours of manual outreach workloads for clinic administrative staff.
Reduces appointment no-show rates by automating proactive patient reminder calls.
